user_context: nothing felling good toady i fill like i done nothing i want go some where alone
hook: It's the love that scares you.
slide2: You want that job but you’re terrified of failing. You want that relationship but you’re scared of the mess. You want to move out but you’re stuck on ‘what if it’s worse?’
slide3: It’s not about being brave. It’s about being tired of the same old ‘what ifs’ ringing in your head like a broken bell.
slide4: You fantasize about walking into a room and being seen. But then you freeze because what if they don’t like what they see?
closer: What’s one thing you want so bad it makes you nauseous?
caption: been feeling like a ghost in my own life lately. like i’m watching myself from outside my body and none of this feels real. what’s the last thing that made you feel alive?
